structural_validation_command: set -euo pipefail; cd /Users/josh/Developer/skillos; for f in .flywheel/MISSION.md .flywheel/GOAL.md .flywheel/STATE.md state/kernel.json; do [ -s "$f" ] || { echo "FAIL: $f missing or empty" >&2; exit 1; }; done; flywheel-loop doctor --repo /Users/josh/Developer/skillos --json | jq -e '.status == "ok" and .action == "ready_for_tick"' >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL: flywheel-loop doctor not ready_for_tick" >&2; exit 2; }; echo "OK: structural validation passed"
source_mutation_allowed_when: Only after strict doctor returns ok and a loop tick selects a bounded patch.
